Notice Of Application For Writ Of Possession And Hearing And Application;
Off Calendar Nov-07-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Ford Motor Credit Company's Application for Writ of Possession granted. No writ shall issue unless and until plaintiff has filed an undertaking in the sum of $40,000.00. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit, not reported.
